featured_projects.name: Everydayppl
featured_projects.description: Everyday People (EP) is a dynamic community and a cultural platform. Recognized by Vice as 'The World’s Coolest Day Party,' EP stands at the forefront of uniting the musical, aesthetic, and cultural realms of the global diaspora into a harmonious celebration of black joy.

featured_projects.name: NPower365
featured_projects.description: NPOWER365 is the ultimate community app designed specifically for Black, same-gender-loving (SGL) men in the Atlanta area. Whether you're looking to build friendships, stay updated on events, or access vital healthcare resources, NPOWER365 offers a safe, inclusive, and empowering space just for you.

featured_projects.name: Splash N Drip
featured_projects.description: Splash N Drip is a platform maintaining the perfect look for your vehicle, ensuring the entire experience is seamless and stress-free. Nestled in the heart of London, we pride ourselves on delivering unparalleled services that exceed your wildest expectations

featured_projects.name: Say It in a Card
featured_projects.description: Developed a unique greeting card platform focused on inclusivity by eliminating gender and cultural specificity in messaging. Designed a versatile content structure where each card emphasizes universal emotions, allowing users to share cards across diverse relationships and occasions.

featured_projects.name: SWEATBOX
featured_projects.description: the Sweatbox App, the ultimate digital companion for all Sweatbox members. Our app is designed to streamline your experience, providing an easy and efficient way to purchase and renew your memberships. With a user-friendly interface, managing your membership has never been simpler

featured_projects.name: Zaatar w Zeit
featured_projects.description: Zaatar w Zeit UAE's mobile ordering app makes it easier to enjoy your favorite Zaatar w Zeit items, without the ordering hassle! Download our APP, browse through the different features, add, customize, save to your favorites, schedule, pay, and much more with a few clicks.

featured_projects.name: Your Tour 🌐
featured_projects.description: A comprehensive web application designed to streamline tour management for artists, tour managers, and booking agents. The platform enables efficient coordination of bookings, schedules, and event planning in a centralized system.

featured_projects.name: Screen Stays 🌐
featured_projects.description: A Cine full-featured accommodation booking web application inspired by platforms like Airbnb. The platform allows users to browse, list, and book stays seamlessly, providing a user-friendly experience for both hosts and guests.

featured_projects.name: The AppKit 🌐
featured_projects.description: A multi-portal web application that enables clients to request mobile and web development services through a streamlined booking system. The platform simplifies project initiation and communication between clients and development teams. Designed and implemented dedicated portals for Admin, Clients, and Developers to manage workflows efficiently. Features include task assignment, bug tracking, project status monitoring, and real-time updates to ensure transparency across all stakeholders.

featured_projects.name: Chatbot AI 🌐
featured_projects.description: Full-stack AI customer support chatbot with Next.js, Google GenAI, enterprise auth, and embeddable dashboard.
